programs.title: Father Brown
programs.desc: It's December and Father Brown, Mrs McCarthy and Bunty are visited by an old friend. However, Christmas in Kembleford is soon disrupted by the discovery of a body in the woods.

programs.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programs.desc: Two weeks after the disappearance of schoolgirl Sarah Middleton, her body is found in a secluded lake by a fisherman. When a second schoolgirl goes missing, Lynley and Havers begin a desperate race to find her.

programs.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programs.desc: When Detective William Murdoch of the Toronto Constabulary investigates the bizarre death of a science professor, it appears that the weapon may have shockingly been a swarm of bees.

programs.title: Father Brown
programs.desc: It's December and Father Brown, Mrs McCarthy and Bunty are visited by an old friend. However, Christmas in Kembleford is soon disrupted by the discovery of a body in the woods.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Charlie Ross is in Hele, near Exeter, as experts Caroline Hawley and John Cameron steer the red and blue teams towards the best items and battle it out at auction in Bristol. Charlie discovers a link between Strictly Come Dancing, the Mars landing and an 19th-century inventor.

programs.title: Australia's Deadliest
programs.desc: A surfer catches a wave straight into the jaws of a shark, while a toddler is strangled by a python and a volunteer surf lifesaver is stung by the venomous barb of a stingray.
